gap.$description: M3 primary tabs sit flush in the tab bar: no inter-tab gap (md.comp.primary-navigation-tab).

width.$description: M3 md.comp.divider.thickness: 1dp divider under the tab bar.

color.$description: M3 md.sys.color.outline-variant as the tab bar divider (ki.outline.med-em resolves to neutral-variant 80 light / 30 dark, the outline-variant pair).
